data.body: EPIC COMPLETE + LANDED. All 6 tickets closed+signed: epic jira-reb-1003 + leaves 3863(immune-floury-toad)/2ad8(truthful-specified-silverfish)/21dd(indigoid-unmystic-serpent)/f698(taurine-catchable-kakarikis) + discovered bug 2340. Portability stack MERGED to main as Gerrit changes 748/749/750/752 (all LLM-Review+1 + Verified+1, submitted atomically top-down); bug-fix change 751 landed independently first. Deliverables verified on origin/main: .rebar/criteria_routing.json + plan_review_moves.json + prompts/plan-review-project-portability.md + evals/plan-review-project-portability.eval.yaml + docs/plan-review-gate.md dogfood subsection + 4 test files; plus the eval_solver dash/dot fix. Live eval PASSED perfectly (recall 1.0/false_accept 0.0/agreement 1.0/kappa 1.0/stability 1.0), attested on 21dd + epic. TDD held-out discipline honored throughout (RED-first; 3863 via held-out implementer subagent; all validated GREEN). CI flake (test_enrich_queue_prune... concurrency race) handled via auto-recheck landers. Session done.
